results.review_text: Hi butter&, We ordered a wedding tasting and a few extra slices.

We have been ordering cakes from Butter& for years and like to try their new flavors. This year, I ordered a courier pickup via Uber because of the rain and it was handled with care. Ordering and pickup were both a breeze and communication with Amanda and team has always been great. Recommend for special occasions!

This is hands down the best cake ever. I have ordered from them multiple times and their service, timeliness, ordering process, and delivery process have always been excellent. This is my go-to spot for all celebratory occasions.

Truly exquisite cake!! The sponges are light and flavorful. The buttercream is so silky smooth, and the ladies here are always warm when I come in! This is a dogpatch neighborhood gem!! The seasonal coconut and pandan cake slice reminded me that I needed to come write a review for this place. Well done Butter & team.
Online ordering was very simple. I also really appreciated that I could order such a nice cake with only 24 hour notice. Being able to have it delivered on the 24th was also perfect!
...really enjoyed the flavors...order and pickup process were really smooth overall...
The design of the cake I ordered from Butter& was exactly what I was expecting and the team was so great about communicating with me about the custom design!...The cake was ...
I ordered a cake from Butter& for my 40th birthday, and it was an absolute showstopper...visually stunning...most delicious cakes I've ever had...
The whole experience went great...cake did surpass my expectations...most exceptional part was the service...

The chocolate babka was transcendent! I wasn't quite as enthusiastic about the chickpea tarragon bourekas. Parking is a nightmare, as you probably already expect in San Francisco. But the shop is worth it - so cute and welcoming. The staff behind the counter were lovely.

I ordered an array of desserts. Each one better than the last. Highly recommend the rosemary lemon curd tart, pistachio butter cookie, and mahlab. We had ours to go but while there the staff was very friendly.

Loved the details of the store and the food! The cutlery cups and plates are so design-y and compliment well with the plants. The boureka sandwich and pastry were buttery and airy, perfectly sized too. Definitely on the expensive end for a casual breakfast but the experience was good.

This place was so nice. The coffee was delicious and I tried their Mahlab Cake, which was very fluffy and moist. Though all the pastries look so good! The only thing is that it is a little corner and seating is not so easy. Yeah this year is very nice and people so nice!

Wow…just wow. Several of my friends recommended that I try out Loquat when I moved to San Francisco, and I can absolutely see why — it fully lives up to the hype with its outstanding pastries, great coffee, and amazing vibes.
